title: Killing Us Softly 4: Advertising's Image of Women
original_title: Killing Us Softly 4: Advertising's Image Of Women
overview: The documentary focuses on images of women in advertising, in particular on gender stereotypes, the effects of advertising on women's self-image and the objectification of women's bodies.
